actions:
pyautogui.hotkey("win")
time.sleep(0.5)
pyautogui.write("notepad", interval=0.02)
time.sleep(0.5)
pyautogui.press("enter")

time.sleep(1)

time.sleep(1)
pyautogui.write("notepad", interval=0.05)
time.sleep(0.5)
pyautogui.press("enter")
time.sleep(1)

instruction: Look up cute cat videos on line
actions:
pyautogui.hotkey("win")
time.sleep(0.5)
pyautogui.write("chrome", interval=0.02)
time.sleep(0.5)
pyautogui.press("enter")
time.sleep(2)
pyautogui.hotkey("ctrl", "l")
time.sleep(0.5)
pyautogui.write("https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=cute+cat+videos", interval=0.02)
pyautogui.press("enter")
time.sleep(3)
plan: Open Chrome via the Windows Start menu, then navigate directly to a YouTube search results page for cute cat videos.
Subtask: navigate to YouTube search results

actions:

time.sleep(0.5)

plan: Open the Start menu, search for Command Prompt, and launch it by pressing Enter.

instruction: You open my notepad and open a new note and write down the letters a b and C in their
actions:
pyautogui.hotkey("win")
time.sleep(0.5)
pyautogui.write("notepad", interval=0.02)
time.sleep(0.5)
pyautogui.press("enter")
time.sleep(1.5)
pyautogui.write("a b C", interval=0.05)

# Create a new note
pyautogui.hotkey("ctrl", "n")
time.sleep(1)
pyautogui.write("a b C", interval=0.05)
plan: Open Notepad, write the letters in the existing window, then create a new note and write the letters again.
